name: ai1-satellite-tools
description: Manage a CRHQ satellite's resources: install versioned packages (skills, recipes, agents, jobs, services), sync/mirror live components back into a package (backup), run the satellite's Ai1 Platform Hub client (register, config, heartbeat, packages), and manage the satellite from its GitHub Client Repository (polaris)

scripts.test: node tests/skill-recipe.test.mjs && node tests/agent.test.mjs && node tests/job.test.mjs && node tests/runner.test.mjs && node tests/service.test.mjs && node tests/filter.test.mjs && node tests/identity.test.mjs && node tests/options.test.mjs && node tests/install-log.test.mjs && node tests/list-available.test.mjs && node tests/sync.test.mjs && node tests/remote.test.mjs && node tests/polaris.test.mjs

comment: No runtime dependencies — yaml is vendored at scripts/lib/vendor/yaml.mjs so the skill installs without npm install. To regenerate that bundle, install yaml as a devDependency and run the esbuild command in its header.
